case_title: CITIBANK N.A. VS. VENANCIO R. RUIZ

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, VENANCIO R.
